title.en: Environmental testing - Part 2-1: Tests - Test A: Cold

standards.abstract: Specifies a standard environmental test method (cold test) for determining the ability of components and equipment to withstand low temperatures.
standards.scope: Environmental testing -- Tests -- Test A: Cold.

title.en: Environmental testing - Part 2-2: Tests - Test B: Dry heat

standards.abstract: Specifies a standard environmental test method (dry heat test) for determining the ability of components and equipment to withstand high temperatures.
standards.scope: Environmental testing -- Tests -- Test B: Dry heat.

title.en: Environmental testing - Part 2-30: Tests - Test Db: Damp heat, cyclic (12 h + 12 h cycle)

standards.abstract: Specifies a standard environmental test method for damp heat cyclic conditions.
standards.scope: Environmental testing -- Tests -- Test Db: Damp heat, cyclic (12 h + 12 h cycle).

title.en: Environmental testing - Part 2-6: Tests - Test Fc: Vibration (sinusoidal)

standards.abstract: Specifies a standard environmental test method for sinusoidal vibration testing of components and equipment.
standards.scope: Environmental testing -- Tests -- Test Fc: Vibration (sinusoidal).

title.en: Environmental testing - Part 2-30: Tests - Test Db: Damp heat, cyclic (12 h + 12 h cycle)

standards.abstract: Environmental damp heat cyclic test methods.

title.en: Environmental testing - Part 2-78: Tests - Test Cab: Damp heat, steady state

standards.abstract: Environmental steady-state damp heat test methods.

title.en: Standard Practice for Performance Testing of Shipping Containers and Systems

standards.abstract: Performance testing methods for shipping containers and packaging systems.
